name: Tangy Barbecue Sauce
directions: In a medium saucepan, cook the onion in the olive oil over medium heat until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the chili powder and cumin and cook, stirring, for 1 minute.
Stir in the vinegar, beer, ketchup, Worcestershire sauce, brown sugar, and mustard.
Add the garlic, Tabasco, salt and pepper.
Bring to a boil, reduce the heat to medium low, and simmer for about 15 minutes, or until the sauce is slightly thickened.

name: Chipotle Puree
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a saucepan over high heat.
Bring to the boil, decrease heat to medium low and simmer for 30-45 minutes.
Remove from the heat and cool completely.
Puree the mixture in a blender until smooh.
Store in an airtight container for up to 3 days.
If you can buy cans of chipotles en adobo (chiles marinated in a saucy paste of vinegar and spices) you can just puree that as a substitute.

name: Spicy BBQ Sauce
directions: Gently fry onion and garlic in the oil until the onion is transparent.
Add remaining ingredients, stir, cover pot and simmer for 15 minutes.

name: White Barbecue Sauce
directions: Place all the ingredients in a mixing bowl and mix thoroughly until well blended.
Refrigerate until ready to use.

name: Spicy Chipotle Chili Mayonnaise
directions: Whisk all ingredients together and put on your favorite sandwich!

name: Horseradish Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in small bowl.
Cover and refrigerate.

name: Southern Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a heavy kettle (or use a diffuser if using a stainless steel pot).
Simmer gently for 1 1/2- 2 hours--watch the heat carefully, because the sauce will burn if heat is too high.
Sauce will cook down in volume& gradually thicken--you can stop the process when it reaches your desired consistency.

name: Hot Mustard Sauce
directions: Just mix and refrigerate.

similar.name: Hot Scotch Bonnet Chile Pepper and Mango Sauce

name: Chipotle Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients in blender until smooth.
Serve with grilled seafood or make seafood taco with grilled seafood, chopped lettuce, cilantro and some of the Chipotle sauce.

name: Chipotle Mayonnaise
directions: Place ingredients in food processor or blender and process until smooth and creamy.
Store in airtight container until ready to serve (up to one week).

name: Zesty Dipping Sauce
directions: Mix ingredients together in a bowl with a tight lid.
Refrigerate for an hour.

name: Spicy Honey Mustard Dipping Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients; use for dipping delicious, bad-for-you deep-fried goodies!

name: Creole Sauce
directions: In a medium size saucepan, over medium heat, heat the oil.
Add the chopped onion, celery, bell pepper and garlic cooking until slightly wilted.
Add the tomatoes and cook for an additional 1 to 2 minutes.
Add about 1 1/2 cups stock, taking care not to add to much.  You can always add more if needed.
Add the seasonings, bay leaves, hot sauce and Worcestershire sauce; stir and reduce heat to simmer.
Mix the cornstarch with equal amounts of water and stir 1 tablespoon of mixture into sauce.
Allow to cook for a few minutes, stir and add additional water/cornstarch mixture if the sauce looks thin or add additional stock if sauce is to thick.
Simmer about 20 minutes adding additional stock as necessary.
The last 10 minutes of cooking time, stir in the parsley and green onions.
Remove bay leaves, taste and adjust seasonings as needed.
Use the sauce to make your favorite recipe for shrimp creole, etc.
This sauce can be frozen in sturdy container and thawed in refrigerator before reheating and using.

name: Cajun Remoulade Sauce
directions: Mix add ingredients together in a small bowl.
Cover and refrigerate for a couple of hours to blend flavors.
This will keep for about 3 days in your refrigerator.

name: BBQ Sauce by Max Power
directions: In a medium sauce pan over medium high heat melt the butter then add the onions and garlic. Saute until the onions are tender (about 5 minutes). Add the remaining ingredients, bring to a boil then reduce heat and simmer until ready to serve. You can add the Cayenne pepper to suit your taste. I usually make a weak batch for the light weights and a hotter batch for the real lovers of a spicy sauce.

name: Clint-Os BBQ Sauce
directions: Melt butter,add onion and garlic. Saute until onions are golden brown. Stir remaining ingriediants. Reduce heat to low and cook til thickens.

name: Asian Dipping Sauce
directions: In a small bowl, combine all ingredients and stir with a fork.
Divide into single serving bowls for your guests.
Enjoy!

name: Cocktail Sauce
directions: Mix all ingredients together and chill for at least 1 hour before serving.

similar.name: Hot Scotch Bonnet Chile Pepper and Mango Sauce

name: Hot Scotch Bonnet Chile Pepper and Mango Sauce
directions: Carefully wash the scotch bonnet pepper and remove the stalks. Be careful not to rub your eyes!
Peel the mango and remove seed.
Steam the chillies for 6 minutes then place into blender with all other ingredients and blend well.
If the sauce looks a little too thick for you liking add a little more white wine vinegar.
After blending transfer into a small saucepan bring to boil and simmer gently for 7 to 8  minutes.
Transfer the sauce into sterilised container and seal.
Should keep for a few months in the fridge.

name: Kicked up BBQ Sauce
directions: Whisk all ingredients together in a medium sauce pan.
Bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Pour over meat of choice and bake.

name: Habanero BBQ Sauce
directions: Brown onions and peppers on oil.
Add remaining ingredients and simmer for 30 minutes.
I store this in an old BBQ sauce bottle in the fridge for a few weeks, it keeps pretty well.

name: Bobby's BBQ Sauce
directions: Heat the oil over medium-high heat in a heavy-bottomed saucepan.

Add the onion; cook until soft, 3 to 4 minutes. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minutes. Add the ketchup and 1/3 cup water, bring to a boil and simmer for 5 minutes. Add the remaining ingredients (except salt and pepper); simmer for 10 minutes, or until thickened, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the mixture to a food precessor; puree until smooth. Season with salt and pepper. Pour into a bowl; cool to room temperature.
Brush on burger patties as they cook, and spoon more on when assembling burger.

name: Simple and Easy Hot Dog Sauce
directions: In a sauce pan mix all ingerdients and simmer for 30 minute until thickened.
Serve over hot dogs, burgers or fries.

similar.name: Spicy and Sweet Strawberry BBQ Sauce

name: The Other BBQ Sauce
directions: Mix all ingrediants till blended well, adjust to personal taste. Baste both sides of preferred grilling meat, and enjoy!

name: Sweet Mustard Sauce
directions: In a small saucepan, combine mustard, sugar and salt.  Add vinegar and egg, blending well.  Cook over low heat 2-3 minutes or until sauce is thickened, stirring constantly.  Refrigerate 10-15 minutes, then stir in mayonnaise.  Store in refrigerator.  This should make about 3/4 cup.

name: Spicy and Sweet Strawberry BBQ Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a food processor or blender and puree until smooth.
Pour the sauce into a jar and chill, covered, until ready to use.

similar.name: Simple and Easy Hot Dog Sauce

name: Honey Chipotle Barbecue Sauce
directions: Combine all ingredients in a food processor and blend until very smooth, 1-2 minutes.   Refrigerate.
Sauce may become quite thick once refrigerated.  Just heat for a few seconds in microwave.
Recipe can be doubled or tripled and the level of chipotle pepper can be adjusted to suit personal preferences.

name: Jalapeno Pineapple BBQ Sauce
directions: Melt butter in saute pan.
Sweat onions in butter.
Add a teaspoon of salt.
When onions are translucent, add garlic, jalapeno and pineapple.
Saute until jalapeno and pineapples become soft.
Add ketchup, stirring often until ketchup is heated through.
Finish with worcestershire, stir to combine.
Remove from heat and allow to cool.
Once cooled, move to blender and process to combine.
Add ketchup sparingly if sauce is to thick.

name: T-Bonz BBQ Sauce
directions: Bring all ingredients to a boil let cook for 10-15 minutes (or to your liking).  You can store this in the refrigerator.  I put this into 8 oz mason jars and sealed them.  Makes great gifts!

name: Spicy Ketchup
directions: Combine all ingredients in a small bowl, stirring with a whisk.

name: Fiery Chipotle Ketchup
directions: Place all ingredients in a small mixing bowl.  Stir well. Serve at once, or refrigerate, covered, until ready to serve.

name: Chipotle Mayonnaise
directions: Combine all of the ingredients and serve.

name: Habanero Hot Sauce
directions: Put everything in a food processor or blender until there are no more chunks.
Pour into a glass jar or bottle. I poured mine into a clean 12-oz bottle that used to hold Crystal hot sauce, because I wanted the shaker top insert.
If you want to keep it shelf-stable, you could probably pour into glass jars and process in a boiling water bath for 10 minutes.

name: BBQ Sauce: Sweet and Spicy
directions: Combine all ingredients except red pepper flakes in a small size sauce pan. Whisk while heating over a medium-low flame. Once sugar is dissolved, add in red pepper flakes. Simmer 5 minutes, whisking often.

Once everything is incorporated, and you've adjusted the taste to your liking, let cool completely and store in an air tight jar for up to 3 weeks in the refrigerator (that's the longest it ever lasted in our house, it may stay fresh longer). If not using right away, mix sauce well, before using. (Nicely fills a recycled and cleaned, 16oz olive jar for storing in the fridge).

*Note: While the ingredients have time to meld together in the fridge, the flavor will change a bit. Keep this in mind while tasting during the preparation. A little bit hot will get hotter --  a little bit sweet will get sweeter.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Simple and Easy Hot Dog Sauce
Spicy and Sweet Strawberry BBQ Sauce

name: Chipotle Remoulade
directions: Combine in food processor first 11 ingredients (green onions thru salt); blend until smooth.  Stir in with a spatula the mayonnaise.
Refrigerate.
